display.name: Stones Around a Dry Well
display.short_description: The well has been dry for years, but someone kept packing loose stones back over the mouth as if it still hid something worth guarding.

choices.label: Hook the sealed jar out
choices.summary: A cool jar rides up on the old line, still tight enough to drink from.

choices.label: Work the chain free from the stones
choices.summary: The rusted links still make decent repair iron if you are patient enough to pull them clean.
